caption: Two men sit side-by-side in an indoor setting in front of a television screen. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and a necklace, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace. Behind them, a shelf holds a collection of DVDs and games. A glowing yellow neon sign on the wall above them reads "STUPID REACTIONS". On-screen text identifies the men as "@RICKSEGALL" and "@KORBINMILES", and a small "PATREON" logo is visible. As the sequence progresses, the man on the left changes his facial expression from a wide smile to a neutral look, then to a surprised open-mouthed expression, and finally looks toward the other man. Meanwhile, the man on the right maintains a similar posture throughout, resting his chin on his hand with his finger pressed against his lip and looking forward or slightly toward the left.
